title: polystichum setiferum var. hastulatum
intro: Polystichum setiferum var. hastulatum is a variety of the soft shield fern, a type of flowering plant in the family Dryopteridaceae. This plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help alleviate respiratory issues and skin irritations. The health benefits of Polystichum setiferum var. hastulatum include its ability to soothe coughs and reduce inflammation, making it a popular remedy for bronchitis and other respiratory conditions. The plant can be prepared as a tea or tincture, or used in topical applications to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
